patches_self_applied.ISS-764: Fixed: normalize 21 bare numeric restates_win IDs to WIN-NNN format in predictions.json. All 3290 tests pass.

pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 11th consecutive quiet poll. Dome V51.1, 69 WINs, 94.5% accuracy unchanged. No canary triggers. All parameter canaries stable.
pipeline_status.analyst: 12 pending EXPs in tracker (EXP-062, 064, 080-089). New EXPs created this run: EXP-088 (HOL-NARRATIVE/STRESSTEST rhetoric review), EXP-089 (HOL-COMPLETENESS/REDUNDANCY).
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 66 pending reviews in digest (10 critical, 36 major, 16 moderate). This run: 11 stale reviews marked processed. Queue depth 0+1 (HOL-NARRATIVE pushed). Mode: BAU, 240min interval.
pipeline_status.integrity: 09:12 check flagged build drift (already resolved by later runs), 3 phantom EXPs (EXP-058/061 output files exist, EXP-066 is batch integration — not phantom). Progressive disclosure gap noted for WIN TLDRs.

internal_issues.description: predictions.json had 21 entries with bare numeric restates_win IDs (e.g., '068' instead of 'WIN-068'). Build normalizes both correctly but inconsistency suggests multi-source data assembly.
HOL-NARRATIVE: Overview scorecard declares '0 Actual Wins' before presenting evidence. Defender objection: 'verdict before trial.'
HOL-STRESSTEST: No explicit success category — what would a genuine dome WIN look like? Review defines disqualifications but not qualifications.
HOL-COMPLETENESS: Part 4.6 code analysis uses aggregate stats (24/34/6) with zero named WIN examples. Defenders will ask 'show me one'.
HOL-REDUNDANCY: Eclipse/Chapman argument appears in 6+ locations with inconsistent detail. Bloat and inconsistency risk.
HOL-STRESSTEST: 'Std Model Explains' (24% of WINs) conflates 'globe predicts same' vs 'globe also explains differently' — two distinct epistemic situations.

recommended_actions.action: Analyst should pick up EXP-088 (HOL-NARRATIVE/STRESSTEST rhetoric) and EXP-082 (NMP drift/kill-shots). High narrative impact.
Analyst should address EXP-080/081 (Part 4.6 hardcoded/post_hoc code analysis) — ISS-747/748 are critical issues awaiting analyst investigation.
Progressive disclosure gap: 70 WINs lack tldr_evidence/tldr_verdict. EXP-??? needed to add TLDRs to all WINs (medium priority).

staleness_gate_results.rationale: Cycle-1 section reviews (SEC-3.5.x, SEC-4.5.x, SEC-4.6.x) all addressed by V6 restructure rewrites. Part6-sha256 and predictions-catalog critical holes already patched in prior runs today.
